description_long: This is an electric guitar with a single-cutaway body design, featuring a highly polished, quilted maple top with a natural wood finish. The body is contoured and has a glossy sheen, with two metallic humbucker pickups and a fixed bridge. The neck is dark, likely rosewood or ebony, with white fret markers and a matching headstock that has six tuning pegs arranged in a row. Chrome hardware is visible, including the bridge, pickup covers, and tuning machines. The guitar's overall appearance is elegant and modern, with a focus on the natural wood grain and high-quality craftsmanship. The instrument is designed for performance and visual appeal, suitable for use in urban music venues or street performances.
description: A polished, natural-finish electric guitar with a quilted maple top, chrome hardware, and dual humbucker pickups. The body and neck showcase a high-gloss wood grain and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the guitar, including the pickups, bridge, and fretboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's thickness, contoured body, and the length of the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the body and neck, with the headstock and tuning pegs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body profile, neck, and headstock from a different angle.
attribute_headstock_design: Rectangular headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a flat top contour.
